name: claude-creative-studio
description: Professional DA generation pipeline for Claude Code — brand identity, 3D logos, interactive HTML brandbook, branded visuals, social carousels, and full brandbook export.

image_provider.description: Image generation backend: gemini (Nano Banana — GEMINI_API_KEY, free ~500/day) or openai (gpt-image-1 — OPENAI_IMAGE_KEY, ~$0.04-0.19/image). Full pipeline uses ~40-50 images.

creative_temperature.description: Creative diversity for 3D logo proposals: conservative (3 similar), balanced (3 different materials), adventurous (5 experimental)

da_sections.description: DA HTML sections: all (16 sections incl. moodboard, font exploration, construction grid, clear zone, brand applications), classic (original 10), or comma-separated section numbers (00-15)
